visualizerParams.title: Bug Squasher: Palindrome Reverse
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The palindrome check is failing because the `reverse()` method is being used in-place on the original array, modifying it before comparison.

solution.explanation: `reverse()` modifies the array in-place. While `split('').reverse()` works fine because it's a new array, understanding in-place modifications is crucial in JS.
